# double

**Type Property**

A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a double line.

## Declaration

```swift
static var double: CTUnderlineStyle { get }
```

## Constants

- **single**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a single line.
- **thick**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a thick line.
